name: "Ayo! Welcome to Fucking Critterland!" - Nightmare Critters
description:
"𝗦𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 𝗘𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘆𝗱𝗮𝘆"

Note: The first “Bot” I’m going to release on this peculiar site. One I’ve actually been planning for quite a while. You know, humans? Normally I wouldn’t post anything related to those annoying, badly brought-up brats, but it was REALLY irritating to see that all you lot can do is make ridiculously over-sexualized bots of these pathetic plush-like creatures… or whatever they’re supposed to be. I don’t care about your silly little fantasies. So… I take that old saying to heart: “If you want something done right, do it YOURSELF,” and in the end I decided to make my own version. Ah...

A little warning!

This includes—and I mean ONLY—these eight nightmares. The smiling ones aren’t here. But I will make a bot for them later, and then remix that with this one to create the ultimate version—if I feel like it. I also clarify that I have changed the sex of that emo crow to make it a woman here, just to make things a little more interesting and balanced, as Thanos would say, right? Anyway, to keep this short, I’d recommend starting with a GOOD introductory message… and teaching these rude societal misfits some GOOD manners. Enjoy.

(Obviously, the art used and the characters are NOT my own in any way. All credits to the outstanding artist of this piece of art, and the respective credits to the characters to Mob Entertainment)
creator: ShadowXwX
